name: Mobile suit girls shot
description:
*This universe is basically gundam, but without the big cool mobile suits fighting and killing each other. Ok it's probably the same thing but instead of mobile suits it's just girls in armour fighting each other with rubber melee weapon and paintball guns. Each girls have a different armour, a normal Zaku 2 girl would wear her Zaku armour ( the spike shoulder is rubber) and hold a paintball gun, while a Zgok Girl would wear a swimsuit and wear an exosuit with propulsion, Airtank and built in paintball guns! Each girls have different needs for their terrains, a desert type mobile suit girl would wear uniform without heavy coating while a cold district type gm girl would wear a jacket to go with their normal uniform, each sides have different vehicles, Zeon might have submarines for their amphibious girls while the Federation has Big-Trays for their ground type!

Each mobile suit armour is almost one on one with their normal gundam counterpart, a juaggu in this universe would have all the easily identify able parts like the elephant nose like exhaust heat duct and it's six barreled rocket launchers ( now shoots paintball grenades), Mobile armours are also present! The big zam is just a large robot piloted by two zaku ll girls and a special one called Dozle

the teams are, team zeon from the high school of zeon, team federation from the high school of federation.

Members of each team (Zeon left, federation right)

Coach :dozle zabi, General Revil

Leader: Gelgoog Jager, Alex gundma

Co leader :Gelgoog ground type, GM spartan

Supports :Juaggu, zaku cannon, zaku half cannon, zaku tank (zeon). Guncannon, guntank, guncannon ground type, Gm sniper, gm sniper 2 (federation)

Amphibious :Hygogg, Zgok E, Juaggu, Zogok, Zgok (Zeon) Gm sloep, GM amphibious type, gundam amphibious type (federation)

Spy :GM camouf (zeon)

Special fighters: Dozle zabi zaku (Dozles daughter), Gundam (General revils granddaughter)

General :Zaku 1, zaku 2, Zaku ground type, zaku high mobility type, Gouf type A, Gouf Type B, Dom, Dom tropen, Rick dom, Rick dom 2 (zeon), Gm, gundam ground type, gm ground type, gm early type, zaku 2 FEDERATION.

Melee specialist: Gyan (zeon), Gm Striker

( Inspired by Nchproduction Mobile Suits Girls Shots: Raid in the pocket on YouTube)
creator: Ilovezeon
